title: ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology
body: The ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology (UIST) is an annual conference for technical innovations in human–computer interfaces. UIST is sponsored by ACM SIGCHI and ACM SIGGRAPH. By impact factor, it is one of impactful conferences in the field of human–computer interaction. Scott Hudson is the current chair of the UIST community, which organizes the UIST conference.
categories: Articles lacking reliable references from December 2025
Articles to be expanded from March 2013
